# Render Transform Providers

## TokenRemapProvider
Maps design tokens from one palette to another. Used for
theme switching: `palette.primary → palette.primary-dark`.

## A11yAdaptProvider
Accessibility adaptations: high contrast mode, reduced motion,
focus indicators. Transforms preserve WCAG compliance.

## BindRewriteProvider
Rewrites data bindings in render programs. Used when concept
state field names change but the widget spec hasn't been updated.

## CustomTransformProvider
Arbitrary transformations via user-supplied functions.

## TransformExtractionProvider
Extracts which transforms have been applied to a render program
for auditing and debugging.
